evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Have been diagnosed with moderate to severe Atopic Dermatitis for at least 12 months.~* Have had inadequate response or intolerance to existing topical (applied to the skin) medications within 6 months preceding screening.~* Are willing to discontinue certain treatments for eczema (such as systemic and topical treatments during a washout period).~* Agree to use emollients daily.~Exclusion Criteria:~* Are currently experiencing or have a history of other concomitant skin co...

NMA_CONFIG.outcome_label: EASI-75 response at wk 12-16 (≥ 75% reduction in Eczema Area and Severity Index)
NMA_CONFIG.note: k=7 Pbo-anchored pivotal Phase 3 trials. Star network. IL-4/13 class: Dupi, Tralok, Lebri. IL-31 class: Nemo. JAK class: Abro, Upa, Bari. Outcome = EASI-75 binary. ORs computed from published responder proportions.

title: RapidMeta Dermatology | Atopic Dermatitis Biologics + JAKi NMA v1.0
